themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And Zedekiah the son of Chenaanah had made him horns of iron, and said, Thus saith the LORD,...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיַּ֥עַשׂ: had made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".
